_INSTRUCTIONS: REPLACE THIS FILE with your actual google-services.json from Firebase Console
_STEPS: 3. Add Android app with package name: com.parisara.cycle
4. Download google-services.json and place it here (app/ folder)
5. Enable Realtime Database in Firebase Console
6. Enable Anonymous Auth in Firebase Console
7. Get a Google Maps API key from https://console.cloud.google.com
8. In app/build.gradle replace YOUR_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY_HERE with your key
